mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meeting_material (meeting_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, uploader_id, uploader_name, upload_time) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderName}, #{uploadTime})

INSERT INTO meeting_question (meeting_id, content, asker_id, asker_name, is_anonymous, status, create_time, attachment_name, attachment_path) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{content}, #{askerId}, #{askerName}, #{isAnonymous}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentPath})

INSERT INTO meeting_reply (question_id, content, replier_id, replier_name, create_time, attachment_name, attachment_path) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{content}, #{replierId}, #{replierName}, #{createTime}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentPath})
INSERT INTO meeting_vote (meeting_id, round, voter_id, voter_name, score, comment, create_time) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{round}, #{voterId}, #{voterName}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{createTime})
INSERT INTO review_log (meeting_id, operator_id, operator_name, action_type, detail, create_time) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{actionType}, #{detail}, #{createTime})
